title: Model Routing Becomes the Frontier AI Control Plane
description: Today’s Six-Month Signal covers Anthropic Sonnet 5 and Fable/Mythos access, GitHub Copilot’s model-routing and budget controls, Fullstack Code Arena, Google ADK and Genkit agent workflows, Latent Space’s skill-engineering interview with Paul Bakaus, and inference-economics analysis from Training Data with Dylan Patel, Air Street, and SemiAnalysis. The through-line: frontier AI is becoming a managed execution environment, not just a leaderboard race.

title: Governed AI Becomes the Frontier Stack
description: Today's episode argues that the next six months of AI systems will be shaped less by raw leaderboard gains and more by governed execution: Anthropic's Fable 5 safeguards, Arena's Fullstack Code Arena, Artificial Analysis and Vals task-economics data, and Cognition/LangChain workflow launches. Sources include Anthropic, Arena, Artificial Analysis, Vals AI, Cognition, LangChain, Simon Willison, SemiAnalysis, Google, and The Information.
